seo.title: Tony's Remodeling | Expert Handyman Services in Irving, TX

hero.headline: Expert Repairs & Home Improvements – Done Right
hero.subheadline: Trusted by homeowners for quality workmanship, timely service, and fair pricing.

featureSections.title: Skilled, Reliable, and Local
featureSections.body: Tony's Remodeling brings over a decade of experience to every job. We treat your home like our own, ensuring every detail is handled with care. From minor fixes to major renovations, we deliver quality results on time and on budget.
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work with a warranty on labor and parts.

featureSections.title: One Call Does It All
featureSections.body: No job is too small or too complex. Tony's Remodeling handles a wide range of handyman services, from plumbing and electrical to carpentry and painting. Save time by hiring one trusted pro for all your home needs.
featureSections.cardBody: We tackle multiple tasks in one visit, so you can check off your list faster.

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major renovations, Tony's Remodeling offers a full spectrum of handyman services in Irving, TX. Each service is backed by years of experience and a commitment to excellence.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs & Installation
services.shortDescription: Fix leaks, unclog drains, install fixtures – fast and reliable.
services.longDescription: Our plumbing experts handle everything from dripping faucets to pipe replacements. We use advanced tools to diagnose issues accurately and provide lasting solutions. Whether it's a kitchen sink, bathroom vanity, or outdoor spigot, we ensure your plumbing works flawlessly.
benefits: Eliminate water waste and lower bills

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess the issue and provide a clear diagnosis.

process.title: Estimate
process.description: You receive a detailed quote with no hidden costs.

process.title: Repair/Install
process.description: Our team completes the work efficiently and cleans up afterward.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on plumbing work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we warranty all labor and parts for one year.

faqs.question: Can you handle emergency plumbing calls?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Call our emergency line for prompt assistance.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and code-compliant electrical repairs and upgrades.
services.longDescription: Our licensed electricians handle outlets, switches, lighting, ceiling fans, and panel upgrades. We prioritize safety and ensure all work meets local codes. From flickering lights to full rewiring, trust Tony's for reliable electrical solutions.
benefits: Enhanced home safety and code compliance
No job too small – from dimmer switches to new circuits

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs and inspect existing wiring.

process.title: Plan
process.description: We design a solution that fits your budget and timeline.

faqs.question: Are your electricians licensed?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our electricians are licensed and insured in Texas.

faqs.question: Can you install outdoor lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in landscape and security lighting.

services.title: Carpentry & Custom Woodwork
services.shortDescription: Custom shelves, trim, doors, and more – built to last.
services.longDescription: Transform your space with custom carpentry. We build and install shelves, crown molding, baseboards, window trim, and custom cabinets. Our attention to detail ensures seamless integration with your home's style. Whether it's a built-in bookcase or a new deck, we deliver precision.
benefits: Add character and value to your home

process.title: Design
process.description: We work with you to create a design that matches your vision.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: We recommend the best wood and finishes for your project.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Expert craftsmanship with clean, precise installation.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate profiles and stains to blend perfectly.

faqs.question: Do you build custom furniture?
faqs.answer: We focus on built-ins and home carpentry, but we can discuss custom pieces.

services.title: Painting & Drywall
services.shortDescription: Interior and exterior painting with flawless finishes.
services.longDescription: Refresh your home with professional painting and drywall services. We repair cracks, holes, and water damage, then apply premium paint for a smooth, lasting finish. Our team preps surfaces meticulously, ensuring no drips or streaks. Choose from thousands of colors to transform any room.
benefits: Instant curb appeal and interior refresh
Low-VOC paints for healthier indoor air

process.title: Prep
process.description: We move furniture, tape edges, and repair any drywall issues.

process.title: Prime & Paint
process.description: We apply primer and two coats of premium paint.

process.title: Cleanup
process.description: We leave your space spotless and ready to enjoy.

faqs.question: How long does interior painting take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms are completed in 1-2 days, depending on size and prep.

faqs.question: Do you offer exterior painting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we paint siding, trim, fences, and decks with weather-resistant coatings.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Handyman Since 2008
about.mission: To provide Irving homeowners with reliable, high-quality handyman services that simplify home maintenance and improve living spaces.
story: Tony's Remodeling started as a small operation with a single truck and a passion for craftsmanship. Founder Tony Martinez saw a need for honest, skilled handyman services in Irving that homeowners could trust. Over the years, word spread about our attention to detail and fair pricing, and we grew into a full-service team serving the entire Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.

Today, we remain committed to the same values: integrity, quality, and customer satisfaction. Every project, big or small, receives the same level of care and professionalism. We're proud to be a part of the Irving community and look forward to helping you love your home.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top materials and proven techniques for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with the utmost respect.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and give back to Irving.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Tony's Remodeling
